title: anthocercis anisantha subsp. collina
intro: Anthocercis anisantha subsp. collina, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, is a type of night-blooming shrub native to Western Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Anthocercis anisantha subsp. collina include its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which may contribute to the prevention of various diseases. However, the lack of extensive research on this plant's herbal preparations makes it challenging to provide specific information on its traditional uses or recommended dosages.
